title: Transaction watcher: on-chain confirmation tracking
description: Background task that watches for incoming shielded transactions, matches them to pending payee sessions, tracks confirmation depth, and triggers PaymentAction::Confirmed when depth threshold is reached.
notes: Phase 1-3 complete: 4/7 children closed. Remaining 3 (nie-ghf, nie-hll, nie-iiy) blocked on nie-gw8k (IVK note decryption in scanner). Epic resumes when nie-gw8k is implemented.
